description: SonicWall SonicOS SSLVPN edge-appliance CVEs — SSLVPN authentication bypass / session hijack (CVE-2024-53704) and SSLVPN SQL injection (CVE-2021-20016). Detection-only endpoint fingerprints.

sslvpn_session_hijack_2024.description: CVE-2024-53704 — SonicWall SonicOS SSLVPN authentication mechanism flaw allowing session hijack. Detection = confirm the SSLVPN portal / auth endpoint fingerprint; session-hijack exploitation is operator-supervised.

probes.description: SSLVPN client endpoint present (200/302 with SonicWall markers) confirms the CVE-2024-53704 SSLVPN surface is exposed. Fingerprint only.
SonicWall SonicOS virtual-office / auth portal fingerprint — confirms the affected appliance.

sslvpn_sqli_2021.description: CVE-2021-20016 — SonicWall SSLVPN SQL injection in the jarrewrite / API handler (unauthenticated). Detection = confirm the SSLVPN endpoint is reachable; no SQLi payload is sent.

probes.description: SonicOS API auth endpoint present (200/401 with SonicWall JSON/markers) = the CVE-2021-20016 SSLVPN SQLi surface family is reachable. Endpoint fingerprint only.
